1102	    def _process_multi_modal_data_neuron(
1103	        self, mm_data: list[MultiModalFeatureSpec]
1104	    ) -> BatchedTensorInputs:
1105	        if len(mm_data) == 1:
1106	            mm_item = mm_data[0].data  # Type: Optional[MultiModalKwargsItem]
1107	            # Get tensor data from MultiModalKwargsItem
1108	            if mm_item is None:
1109	                mm_kwargs: dict[str, NestedTensors] = {}
1110	            else:
1111	                mm_kwargs = mm_item.get_data()
1112	        elif len(mm_data) > 1:
1113	            mm_kwargs = {}
1114	            for mm_item in mm_data:  # Type: List[MultiModalFeatureSpec]
1115	                for k, v in mm_item.data.items():
1116	                    if k not in mm_kwargs:
1117	                        mm_kwargs[k] = []
1118	                    mm_kwargs[k].append(v.data)
1119	
1120	        logger.debug("mm_data in _process_multi_modal_data_neuron: %s", mm_kwargs)
1121	
1122	        if self.model.model.config.model_type == "llava":
1123	            mm_kwargs = self._process_multi_modal_data_neuron_llava(mm_kwargs)
1124	        elif self.model.model.config.model_type == "qwen2_vl":
1125	            mm_kwargs = self._process_multi_modal_data_neuron_qwen2_vl(mm_kwargs)
1126	        elif self.model.model.config.model_type == "qwen3_vl":
1127	            # Qwen3-VL uses the same processing as Qwen2-VL
1128	            mm_kwargs = self._process_multi_modal_data_neuron_qwen2_vl(mm_kwargs)
1129	        elif self.model.model.config.model_type == "llama4":
1130	            pass  # llama4 doesn't require special processing
1131	        else:
1132	            raise NotImplementedError(
1133	                f"processing mm data for model type {self.model.model.config.model_type} not supported on Neuron yet!"
1134	            )
1135	
1136	        return mm_kwargs
1137	
1138	    def _process_multi_modal_data_neuron_llava(self, mm_data):
1139	        # We reconstruct image_sizes here to match HF's implementation
1140	        # since vLLM implementation slices pixel_values for each image separately
1141	        # (see vllm/model_executor/models/llava.py)
1142	        if isinstance(mm_data["pixel_values"], torch.Tensor):
1143	            logger.debug("pixel_values tensor shape: %s", mm_data["pixel_values"].shape)
1144	            pixel_values = mm_data["pixel_values"]
1145	            # Ensure pixel_values is 4D [B, C, H, W]
1146	            # vLLM may pass 3D [C, H, W] for single images
1147	            if pixel_values.dim() == 3:
1148	                pixel_values = pixel_values.unsqueeze(0)
1149	                mm_data["pixel_values"] = pixel_values
1150	                logger.debug("Added batch dimension, new shape: %s", pixel_values.shape)
1151	            # Now pixel_values is 4D [B, C, H, W]
1152	            img_height = pixel_values.shape[2]
1153	            img_width = pixel_values.shape[3]
1154	            # image_sizes must be 2D [[height, width]] for NxDI patchify
1155	            mm_data["image_sizes"] = torch.tensor(
1156	                [[img_height, img_width]], dtype=torch.int32
1157	            )
1158	        elif isinstance(mm_data["pixel_values"], list):
1159	            image_sizes_list = []
1160	            # The below logic pads multiple images within one request to
1161	            # max height and width across all images
1162	            # This mimics the same logic as HF processor
1163	            max_height = 0
1164	            max_width = 0
1165	            for pixel_values in mm_data["pixel_values"]:
1166	                logger.debug("pixel_values.shape: %s", pixel_values.shape)
1167	                # vLLM may pass 3D [C, H, W] for each image
1168	                if pixel_values.dim() == 3:
1169	                    pixel_values = pixel_values.unsqueeze(0)
1170	                    logger.debug(
1171	                        "Added batch dimension, new shape: %s", pixel_values.shape
1172	                    )
1173	                img_height = pixel_values.shape[2]
1174	                img_width = pixel_values.shape[3]
1175	                max_height = max(max_height, img_height)
1176	                max_width = max(max_width, img_width)
1177	                image_sizes_list.append(
1178	                    torch.tensor([img_height, img_width], dtype=torch.int32)
1179	                )
1180	            mm_data["image_sizes"] = torch.stack(image_sizes_list, dim=0)
1181	            padded_pixel_values = []
1182	            for pixel_values in mm_data["pixel_values"]:
1183	                # vLLM may pass 3D [C, H, W] for each image
1184	                if pixel_values.dim() == 3:
1185	                    pixel_values = pixel_values.unsqueeze(0)
1186	                    logger.debug(
1187	                        "Added batch dimension, new shape: %s", pixel_values.shape
1188	                    )
1189	                img_height = pixel_values.shape[2]
1190	                img_width = pixel_values.shape[3]
1191	                padded_pixel_value = torch.nn.functional.pad(
1192	                    pixel_values,
1193	                    (0, max_width - img_width, 0, max_height - img_height),
1194	                    value=0,
1195	                )
1196	                logger.debug("padded_pixel_value shape: %s", padded_pixel_value.shape)
1197	                padded_pixel_values.append(padded_pixel_value.unsqueeze(0))
1198	            mm_data["pixel_values"] = torch.cat(padded_pixel_values, dim=0)
1199	        logger.debug("mm_data in _process_multi_modal_data_neuron_llava: %s", mm_data)
1200	        return mm_data
1201	
1202	    def _process_multi_modal_data_neuron_qwen2_vl(self, mm_data):
1203	        """
1204	        Normalize Qwen2-VL multimodal kwargs into tensors expected by batching.
1205	        """
1206	        pixel_values = mm_data.get("pixel_values")
1207	        if isinstance(pixel_values, list):
1208	            mm_data["pixel_values"] = torch.cat(pixel_values, dim=0)
1209	
1210	        image_grid_thw = mm_data.get("image_grid_thw")
1211	
1212	        if isinstance(image_grid_thw, list):
1213	            mm_data["image_grid_thw"] = torch.stack(image_grid_thw, dim=0)
1214	        elif isinstance(image_grid_thw, torch.Tensor):
1215	            # vLLM may pass 1-D image_grid_thw for single image
1216	            mm_data["image_grid_thw"] = image_grid_thw.unsqueeze(0)
1217	
1218	        logger.debug(
1219	            "mm_data in _process_multi_modal_data_neuron_qwen2_vl: %s", mm_data
1220	        )
1221	        return mm_data
1222	
1223	    def _prepare_model_input(
1224	        self,
1225	        scheduler_output: "SchedulerOutput",
1226	    ) -> ModelInputForNeuron:
1227	        if self.is_chunked_prefill:
1228	            chunked_prefill_model_input = self._prepare_chunked_prefill_inputs(
1229	                scheduler_output
1230	            )
1231	
1232	            multi_modal_kwargs = None
1233	            lora_adapter_ids = None
1234	
1235	            return self._finalize_chunked_prefill_inputs(
1236	                chunked_prefill_model_input,
1237	                multi_modal_kwargs,
1238	                lora_adapter_ids,
1239	            )
1240	        else:
1241	            continuous_batching_model_input, is_prefill = (
1242	                self._prepare_continuous_batching_inputs(scheduler_output)
1243	            )
1244	            return self._finalize_continuous_batching_inputs(
1245	                continuous_batching_model_input,
1246	                is_prefill,
1247	            )
1248	
1249	    def _prepare_chunked_prefill_inputs(
1250	        self,
1251	        scheduler_output: "SchedulerOutput",
1252	    ) -> IntermediateInputData:
1253	        """
1254	        This function is used to prepare the inputs for chunked prefill.
1255	        It needs to treat prefill and decoding requests differently.
1256	          *  For NewRequestData, it is guaranteed to be a prefill request.
1257	          *  For CachedRequestData, it can be a prefill request or a decoding request.
1258	          The way to tell if it is a prefill request is to check if the number of
1259	          computed tokens is less than the number of context tokens.
1260	        """
1261	        data = IntermediateInputData()
1262	        num_scheduled_tokens = scheduler_output.num_scheduled_tokens
1263	        logger.debug("num_scheduled_tokens: %s", num_scheduled_tokens)
1264	
1265	        for request_data in scheduler_output.scheduled_new_reqs:
1266	            self._process_new_request_for_chunked_prefill(
1267	                request_data, num_scheduled_tokens[request_data.req_id], data
1268	            )
1269	
1270	        cached_request_data = scheduler_output.scheduled_cached_reqs
1271	        for i, req_id in enumerate(cached_request_data.req_ids):
1272	            self._process_cached_request_for_chunked_prefill(
1273	                cached_request_data, i, num_scheduled_tokens[req_id], data
1274	            )
1275	
1276	        return data
1277	
1278	    def _prepare_continuous_batching_inputs(
1279	        self,
1280	        scheduler_output: "SchedulerOutput",
1281	    ) -> Tuple[IntermediateInputData, bool]:
1282	        """
1283	        This function is used to prepare the inputs for continuous batching.
1284	            For NewRequestData,
1285	                1. On decode nodes in the DI setting, it should always do decoding.
1286	                2. For all other cases (i.e., prefill nodes in DI, non-DI case), do
1287	                   prefills.
1288	            For CachedRequestData, it is guaranteed to be a decoding request.
1289	        """
1290	        data = IntermediateInputData()
1291	        is_prefill = False
1292	        for request_data in scheduler_output.scheduled_new_reqs:
1293	            if (
1294	                scheduler_output.kv_connector_metadata is not None
1295	                and not scheduler_output.kv_connector_metadata.reqs_to_save
1296	            ):
1297	                # This branch is activated only if the current node is a decode node in the DI setting.
1298	                # 1. we cannot use `request_data.num_computed_tokens > 0` to indicate the node is decode because
1299	                # prefill with APC can also lead to request_data.num_computed_tokens > 0
1300	                # 2. we cannot use `scheduler_output.kv_connector_metadata.reqs_to_recv is not None` because on decode node,
1301	                # the scheduler always schedules transfer before scheduling decode for a request. So the scheduler output
1302	                # for the new decode request has empty reqs_to_recv.
1303	
1304	                logger.debug("Prepare model input for decoding for the new request")
1305	                self._process_new_request_for_disaggregated_inference(
1306	                    request_data, data
1307	                )
1308	                is_prefill = False
1309	            else:
1310	                self._process_new_request_for_continuous_batching(request_data, data)
1311	                is_prefill = True
1312	
1313	        cached_request_data = scheduler_output.scheduled_cached_reqs
1314	        for i, req_id in enumerate(cached_request_data.req_ids):
1315	            self._process_cached_request_for_continuous_batching(
1316	                cached_request_data, i, data
1317	            )
1318	
1319	        return data, is_prefill
1320	
1321	    def _process_new_request_for_continuous_batching(
1322	        self, request_data: NewRequestData, data: IntermediateInputData
1323	    ) -> None:
1324	        # Assign a free sequence id to the new request.
1325	        assert request_data.req_id not in self.vllm_req_to_neuron_seq_id_mapping, (
1326	            "Encountered an existing request ID while prefilling a new request"
1327	        )
1328	        assert self.free_seq_ids, "No free sequence ID available!"
1329	        assigned_slot = self.free_seq_ids.pop()
1330	        self.vllm_req_to_neuron_seq_id_mapping[request_data.req_id] = assigned_slot
1331	
1332	        data.request_ids.append(request_data.req_id)
1333	
1334	        data.input_tokens.append(request_data.prompt_token_ids)
1335	        if len(request_data.prompt_token_ids) > self.max_prompt_length:
1336	            raise ValueError(
1337	                f"Prompt length ({len(request_data.prompt_token_ids)} tokens) exceeds the maximum "
1338	                f"prompt length ({self.max_prompt_length} tokens) for this Neuron model. "
1339	                f'To handle this gracefully during online serving, add "max_prompt_length": '
1340	                f"{self.max_prompt_length} to --additional-config. This will return a 400 error "
1341	                f"for oversized prompts instead of terminating the engine (supported on OpenAI "
1342	                f"/v1/completions and /v1/chat/completions endpoints). Alternatively, provide "
1343	                f"a shorter prompt or recompile the Neuron model with a larger max_prompt_length "
1344	                f'by setting "max_context_length": <desired_length> in override_neuron_config when compiling.'
1345	            )
1346	        data.position_ids.append(list(range(len(request_data.prompt_token_ids))))
1347	        data.input_block_ids.append(assigned_slot)
1348	
1349	        data.full_context_lens.append(len(request_data.prompt_token_ids))
1350	        data.prefill_completion_state.append(None)
1351	        data.adapter_ids.append(self._prepare_adapter_id_in_new_request(request_data))
1352	
1353	        if self.is_prefix_caching:
1354	            self._process_new_request_for_continuous_batching_with_prefix_caching(
1355	                request_data, data
1356	            )
1357	
1358	        if request_data.mm_features:
1359	            data.multi_modal_kwargs = self._process_multi_modal_data_neuron(
1360	                request_data.mm_features
1361	            )
1362	
1363	    def _process_new_request_for_continuous_batching_with_prefix_caching(
1364	        self, request_data: NewRequestData, data: IntermediateInputData
1365	    ) -> None:
1366	        assert len(request_data.block_ids) == 1
1367	        block_table = copy.deepcopy(request_data.block_ids)[0]
1368	
1369	        # pad the block_table to have the length of num_gpu_blocks
1370	        block_size = self.cache_config.block_size
1371	        max_len = self.model_config.max_model_len
1372	        max_blocks_per_seq = max_len // block_size
1373	        padded_block_table = [self._BLOCK_TABLE_PAD] * max_blocks_per_seq
1374	        padded_block_table[: len(block_table)] = block_table[:]
1375	        data.block_tables.append(padded_block_table)
1376	
1377	        data.computed_context_lens.append(request_data.num_computed_tokens)
1378	
1379	        prompt_len = len(request_data.prompt_token_ids)
1380	        slot_mapping_for_cur_seq = [
1381	            (block_table[i // block_size] * block_size + i % block_size)
1382	            if i < prompt_len
1383	            else self._SLOT_MAPPING_PAD
1384	            for i in range(max_len)
1385	        ]
1386	        data.slot_mapping.append(
1387	            slot_mapping_for_cur_seq[request_data.num_computed_tokens :]
1388	        )
1389	
1390	    def _process_new_request_for_disaggregated_inference(
1391	        self, request_data: NewRequestData, data: IntermediateInputData
1392	    ) -> None:
1393	        """
1394	        This method prepares model input for decoding based on NewRequestData.
1395	        This method should only be invoked by decode nodes in the DI setting.
1396	        """
1397	        # Assign a free sequence id to the new request.
1398	        assert request_data.req_id not in self.vllm_req_to_neuron_seq_id_mapping, (
1399	            "Encountered an existing request ID while prefilling a new request"
1400	        )
1401	        assert self.free_seq_ids, "No free sequence ID available!"
1402	        assigned_slot = self.free_seq_ids.pop()
1403	        self.vllm_req_to_neuron_seq_id_mapping[request_data.req_id] = assigned_slot
1404	
1405	        req_id = request_data.req_id
1406	        data.request_ids.append(req_id)
1407	
1408	        data.input_tokens.append([request_data.prompt_token_ids[-1]])
1409	        data.position_ids.append([request_data.num_computed_tokens])
1410	        data.input_block_ids.append(assigned_slot)
1411	
1412	        data.full_context_lens.append(request_data.num_computed_tokens + 1)
1413	        data.prefill_completion_state.append(None)
1414	
1415	        assert len(request_data.block_ids) == 1
1416	        block_table = copy.deepcopy(request_data.block_ids)[0]
1417	
1418	        # pad the block_table to have the length of num_gpu_blocks
1419	        block_size = self.cache_config.block_size
1420	        max_len = self.scheduler_config.max_model_len
1421	        max_blocks_per_seq = max_len // block_size
1422	        padded_block_table = [self._BLOCK_TABLE_PAD] * max_blocks_per_seq
1423	        padded_block_table[: len(block_table)] = block_table[:]
1424	        data.block_tables.append(padded_block_table)
1425	
1426	        data.computed_context_lens.append(request_data.num_computed_tokens)
1427	
1428	        position = request_data.num_computed_tokens
1429	        block_number = block_table[position // self.cache_config.block_size]
1430	        block_offset = position % self.cache_config.block_size
1431	        slot = block_number * self.cache_config.block_size + block_offset
1432	
1433	        data.slot_mapping.append([slot])
1434	
1435	        # TODO: support speculative decoding in disaggregated inference.
1436	        # TODO: support multi-lora in disaggregated inference.
1437	        # TODO: support multi-modal in disaggregated inference.
1438	
1439	    def _process_cached_request_for_continuous_batching(
1440	        self, request_data: CachedRequestData, index: int, data: IntermediateInputData
1441	    ) -> None:
1442	        req_id = request_data.req_ids[index]
1443	        assert req_id in self.vllm_req_to_neuron_seq_id_mapping, (
1444	            "The request ID for the current decode request "
1445	            " is not found in request to sequence ID "
1446	            "mapping"
1447	        )
1448	        data.request_ids.append(req_id)
1449	        state = self.requests[req_id]
1450	
1451	        data.input_tokens.append([state.output_token_ids[-1]])
1452	
1453	        position = self._get_last_token_position(state)
1454	
1455	        data.position_ids.append([position])
1456	        data.input_block_ids.append(self.vllm_req_to_neuron_seq_id_mapping[req_id])
1457	
1458	        data.full_context_lens.append(position + 1)
1459	        data.computed_context_lens.append(position)
1460	        data.prefill_completion_state.append(None)
1461	        data.adapter_ids.append(self._prepare_adapter_id_in_cached_request(req_id))
1462	
1463	        if self.is_prefix_caching:
1464	            self._process_cached_request_for_continuous_batching_with_prefix_caching(
1465	                request_data, index, data
1466	            )
1467	
1468	    def _process_cached_request_for_continuous_batching_with_prefix_caching(
1469	        self, request_data: CachedRequestData, index: int, data: IntermediateInputData
1470	    ) -> None:
1471	        req_id = request_data.req_ids[index]
1472	        state = self.requests[req_id]
1473	        block_table = copy.deepcopy(state.block_ids)[0]
1474	
1475	        attn_tkg_nki_kernel_enabled = (
1476	            self.model.neuron_config.attn_tkg_nki_kernel_enabled
1477	            or self.model.neuron_config.attn_block_tkg_nki_kernel_enabled
1478	        )
1479	        # Pad -1 to allow DMA skipping that is supported
1480	        # by attention TKG kernel.
1481	        block_table_padding = (
1482	            -1 if attn_tkg_nki_kernel_enabled else self._BLOCK_TABLE_PAD
1483	        )
1484	        block_size = self.cache_config.block_size
1485	        max_len = self.model_config.max_model_len
1486	        max_blocks_per_seq = max_len // block_size
1487	        padded_block_table = [block_table_padding] * max_blocks_per_seq
1488	        padded_block_table[: len(block_table)] = block_table[:]
1489	        data.block_tables.append(padded_block_table)
1490	
1491	        position = self._get_last_token_position(state)
1492	
1493	        block_number = block_table[position // self.cache_config.block_size]
1494	        block_offset = position % self.cache_config.block_size
1495	        slot = block_number * self.cache_config.block_size + block_offset
1496	
1497	        # When speculative decoding is enabled, append consecutive slots
1498	        # for the speculative tokens (draft + final alignment on device).
1499	        slots = [slot]
1500	        if self.speculative_config is not None:
1501	            for i in range(1, self.speculative_config.num_speculative_tokens):
1502	                slots.append(slots[0] + i)
1503	
1504	        data.slot_mapping.append(slots)
1505	
1506	    def _prepare_adapter_id_in_new_request(self, request_data: NewRequestData):
1507	        if self.lora_config is None:
1508	            return None
1509	        req_id = request_data.req_id
1510	        # When a LoRA adapter is requested
1511	        if request_data.lora_request is not None:
1512	            lora_name = request_data.lora_request.lora_name
1513	            adapter_id = self.lora_manager.convert_adapter_id_to_index(lora_name)
1514	        else:
1515	            # 0 is a dummy adapter ID for base model only inference
1516	            adapter_id = 0
1517	        self.lora_manager.add_req_id_to_adapter_id_mapping(req_id, adapter_id)
1518	        return adapter_id
1519	
1520	    def _prepare_adapter_id_in_cached_request(self, req_id):
1521	        if self.lora_config is None:
1522	            return None
1523	        return self.lora_manager.get_adapter_id_with_req_id(req_id)
1524	
1525	    def _finalize_continuous_batching_inputs(
1526	        self,
1527	        data: IntermediateInputData,
1528	        is_prefill: bool,
1529	    ) -> ModelInputForNeuron:
1530	        if is_prefill:
1531	            max_seq_len = max(data.full_context_lens)
1532	            assert max_seq_len > 0
1533	            input_tokens = make_tensor_with_pad(
1534	                data.input_tokens,
1535	                pad=0,
1536	                max_len=max_seq_len,
1537	                dtype=torch.long,
1538	                device=self.device,
1539	            )
1540	            position_ids = make_tensor_with_pad(
1541	                data.position_ids,
1542	                pad=0,
1543	                max_len=max_seq_len,
1544	                dtype=torch.long,
1545	                device=self.device,
1546	            )
1547	            input_block_ids = torch.tensor(
1548	                data.input_block_ids, dtype=torch.long, device=self.device
1549	            )
1550	            slot_mapping = make_tensor_with_pad(
1551	                data.slot_mapping,
1552	                pad=self._SLOT_MAPPING_PAD,
1553	                max_len=self.model_config.max_model_len,
1554	                dtype=torch.long,
1555	                device=self.device,
1556	            )
1557	            block_tables = torch.tensor(
1558	                data.block_tables, dtype=torch.long, device=self.device
1559	            )
1560	            full_context_lens = torch.tensor(
1561	                data.full_context_lens, dtype=torch.long, device=self.device
1562	            ).reshape(-1, 1)
1563	            computed_context_lens = torch.tensor(
1564	                data.computed_context_lens, dtype=torch.long, device=self.device
1565	            ).reshape(-1, 1)
1566	
1567	        else:
1568	            input_tokens = make_tensor_with_pad(
1569	                data.input_tokens,
1570	                pad=0,
1571	                max_len=1,
1572	                dtype=torch.long,
1573	                device=self.device,
1574	            )
1575	            position_ids = make_tensor_with_pad(
1576	                data.position_ids,
1577	                pad=0,
1578	                max_len=1,
1579	                dtype=torch.long,
1580	                device=self.device,
1581	            )
1582	            input_block_ids = torch.tensor(
1583	                data.input_block_ids, dtype=torch.long, device=self.device
1584	            )
1585	            slot_mapping = torch.tensor(
1586	                data.slot_mapping, dtype=torch.long, device=self.device
1587	            )
1588	            block_tables = torch.tensor(
1589	                data.block_tables, dtype=torch.long, device=self.device
1590	            )
1591	
1592	            full_context_lens = torch.tensor(
1593	                data.full_context_lens, dtype=torch.long, device=self.device
1594	            ).reshape(-1, 1)
1595	
1596	            # Convert computed_context_lens to tensor
1597	            computed_context_lens = torch.tensor(
1598	                data.computed_context_lens, dtype=torch.long, device=self.device
1599	            ).reshape(-1, 1)
1600	        lora_adapter_ids = None
1601	        if self.lora_config is not None:
1602	            lora_adapter_ids = torch.tensor(
1603	                data.adapter_ids, dtype=torch.long, device=self.device
1604	            )
1605	        return ModelInputForNeuron(
1606	            request_ids=data.request_ids,
1607	            input_tokens=input_tokens,
1608	            position_ids=position_ids,
1609	            input_block_ids=input_block_ids,
1610	            slot_mapping=slot_mapping,

1613	            computed_context_lens=computed_context_lens,
1614	            prefill_completion_state=None,

1616	            multi_modal_kwargs=data.multi_modal_kwargs,
1617	            adapter_ids=lora_adapter_ids,
1618	        )

1620	    def _process_new_request_for_chunked_prefill(
1621	        self,

1624	        data: IntermediateInputData,
1625	    ) -> None:
1626	        data.request_ids.append(request_data.req_id)
1627	        assert len(request_data.block_ids) == 1

1629	
1630	        start = request_data.num_computed_tokens
1631	        end = start + num_scheduled_tokens

1649	    def _process_cached_request_for_chunked_prefill(
1650	        self,
1651	        request_data: CachedRequestData,
1652	        index: int,

1654	        data: IntermediateInputData,
1655	    ) -> None:

1657	        data.request_ids.append(req_id)

1674	        data.position_ids.extend(range(start, end))

1680	            data.slot_mapping.append(
1681	                block_number * self.cache_config.block_size + offset
1682	            )

1684	        data.block_tables.append(block_table)
1685	        data.full_context_lens.append(end)
1686	        data.computed_context_lens.append(start)

1688	
1689	    def _finalize_chunked_prefill_inputs(
1690	        self,
1691	        data: IntermediateInputData,

1695	        device = self.device

1699	        ).reshape(1, -1)
1700	        position_ids = torch.tensor(
1701	            data.position_ids, dtype=torch.long, device=device
1702	        ).reshape(1, -1)

1718	        )

1721	        )

1727	            input_block_ids=input_block_ids,
1728	            slot_mapping=slot_mapping,

1731	            computed_context_lens=computed_context_lens,
1732	            prefill_completion_state=prefill_completion_state,

1734	            multi_modal_kwargs=multi_modal_kwargs,

1738	    def get_nxd_sampling_params(self, input_ids: torch.Tensor):
1739	        if self.model.neuron_config.on_device_sampling_config:
1740	            max_topk = self.model.neuron_config.on_device_sampling_config.global_topk
1741	        else:

1755	                else max_topk

1765	            top_k=top_k,
